articles.title: Porsche is adding an all-electric Cayenne coupe to its lineup
articles.description: Porsche will start selling the Cayenne Coupe Electric in late summer.
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: Bob Iger rejoins Thrive Capital as advisor after Disney exit
articles.description: The former Disney CEO hold a stake in Thrive, and has previously held the role of the venture partner at the firm.
articles.author: Marina Temkin
